# CAP-Digest Post-Release Adoption Plan v1.0

> Status: active - Adoption and feedback window - Last updated: 2026-07-07

This plan covers issue #118 after CAP-Digest v1.0.0 publication.

## Feedback Window

The initial feedback window is open for:

- independent implementation reports;
- fixture ambiguity reports;
- redaction and escaping issues;
- pack compatibility issues;
- requests for a second source-type fixture;
- documentation gaps.

## Triage Buckets

Feedback should be classified as:

- errata candidate for v1.0.x;
- fixture clarification;
- security/privacy issue;
- post-v1.0 feature proposal;
- out of scope for CAP-Digest.

## Adoption Evidence

Adopters should attach conformance reports and state whether the implementation
is independent, derived, or a wrapper around the Python reference.

## Next Source-Type Track

A second source-type fixture is the highest-priority post-v1.0 expansion
candidate. It should use a new CAPP or child issue and must not retroactively
change the v1.0.0 stable claim.
